changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE pass_payment ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(SUPPLIERNAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(INVOICENUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(PONUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(VOUCHERNUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(PAYMENTNUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_NAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCYCODE, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_ACRONYM, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(PAYMENTTYPE, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(TRANSACTION_CODE, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce( coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '') || ' ' || CASE WHEN coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '') ~* '^CW[0-9]{4,6}$' THEN substring(CONTRACTNUMBER from '[0-9]+$') ELSE '' END, '' )), 'A') ) STORED;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE pass_payment DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS search_vector;

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_pass_payment_search_vector_gin ON pass_payment USING GIN (search_vector);

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS pass_payment_fts_match(tsvector, text);

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS pass_payment_fts_rank(tsvector, text);
